description.value:
Warrior

The Warrior is a fighter first and foremost — a soldier, a brawler, a veteran of countless battles who lives for the clash of arms. Unlike the Assassin's surgical precision, the Warrior excels in open combat, standing toe-to-toe with the enemy and beating them through superior skill, toughness, and firepower. They are the warband's shield and hammer, the one who holds the line when all others falter.

Role Aptitudes

Ballistic Skill, Defence, Fellowship, Offence, Weapon Skill

Role Talent

Iron Jaw or Rapid Reload

Role Bonus

Unrelenting Warrior: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, after making a successful attack, a Warrior may spend a Fate Point to make an additional attack with the same weapon as a Free Action.

specialAbilities.name: Unrelenting Warrior
specialAbilities.description: In addition to the normal uses of Fate Points, after making a successful attack, a Warrior may spend a Fate Point to make an additional attack with the same weapon as a Free Action.
